Package com.saperion.ws.wrapper

Class SaWsAccessData

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ws.wrapper.SaWsAccessData
public class SaWsAccessData extends Object
Class for document access data.
Author:
dam

  • Method Details

    • getAccessFlags

      public int getAccessFlags()
      Returns complete Saperion access flags for the document. (See ACC_* flag constants in SaConstants for reference.)
      Returns:
      the accessFlags
